seoTitle: South Penrith vs South Tamworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Penrith and South Tamworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Penrith vs South Tamworth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Penrith and South Tamworth.
heading: South Penrith vs South Tamworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Penrith, New South Wales and South Tamworth, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Tamworth has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to South Penrith (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Penrith or South Tamworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Penrith has a flood risk score of 55/100, while South Tamworth scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Penrith scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. South Tamworth scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Penrith or South Tamworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Tamworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
